faqData.question: What time should I arrive?
faqData.answer: We'd love to see you between 2:00 PM and 3:00PM! Giving yourself a little extra time ensures you'll find a great seat before the ceremony begins.

faqData.question: Can I bring plus one?
faqData.answer: As much as we'd love to celebrate with everyone, our venue has a limited capacity. We have reserved seats specifically for the number of guests reserved in your invitation. We truly appreciate your understanding.

faqData.question: Should I do RSVP?
faqData.answer: As we begin our journey together, having you by our side would make it truly complete. Please kindly let us know if you can attend by May 4, 2026. We can't wait to share these memories with you! After this date, we will be finalizing our numbers with the venue and may not be able to accommodate late changes.

faqData.question: Can we bring our kids along?
faqData.answer: We wish we could celebrate with every single one of your sweet children! Due to space, we've limited our younger guests to our family and those walking down the aisle with us. We look forward to a wonderful evening of fun and hope this allows you a well-deserved night off to celebrate with us!

faqData.question: What if I can't make it?
faqData.answer: You will be missed! If your plans change, please kindly let us know as soon as possible via Facebook Messenger or at historillopatriciaann@gmail.com and domnikko.neg@gmail.com

faqData.question: Can I take photos?
faqData.answer: Yes, please! Capture all the love you see. All we ask is that you kindly stay clear of the center aisle so our professional photographers can work their magic.
